pi_items.source: WooCommerce code reference and documentation - woocommerce_manage_stock controls whether stock management is enabled globally
WooCommerce GitHub issues (#28236, #26002, #2882) confirm default is 60 minutes. Task sets initial value to 60 and requires agent to change to 45.
WooCommerce documentation and GitHub issues confirm woocommerce_notify_low_stock option enables low stock notifications
WooCommerce GitHub issue #12163 and documentation confirm woocommerce_notify_no_stock option enables out of stock notifications

GitHub gist and WooCommerce documentation confirm woocommerce_stock_email_recipient is a valid database option for notification recipient email. Email format matches expected pattern from task setup script.
WooCommerce code reference and documentation confirm woocommerce_notify_low_stock_amount stores the low stock threshold. Task setup initializes to 2 and requires agent to change to 10.
WooCommerce GitHub issues #29411, #41224 and documentation confirm woocommerce_notify_no_stock_amount stores the out of stock threshold. Task setup initializes to 0 and requires agent to change to 2.
WooCommerce GitHub issue #20736 and documentation confirm woocommerce_hide_out_of_stock_items controls whether out of stock items are hidden from the catalog

WooCommerce code reference at wp-kama.com and woocommerce.github.io confirm that wc_format_stock_for_display() function uses 'low_amount' as a valid value for woocommerce_stock_format. This displays stock only when inventory is at or below the low stock threshold.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures WooCommerce global inventory settings through the Products > Inventory admin page. All nine metadata claims about database option names and target values are verified as legitimate WooCommerce inventory options: woocommerce_manage_stock (yes), woocommerce_hold_stock_minutes (45 minutes for pending order stock reservation), woocommerce_notify_low_stock and woocommerce_notify_no_stock (enable notifications), woocommerce_stock_email_recipient (warehouse@example.com), woocommerce_notify_low_stock_amount (10 units), woocommerce_notify_no_stock_amount (2 units), woocommerce_hide_out_of_stock_items (yes), and woocommerce_stock_format (low_amount to show stock only when low). The environment is a synthetic WooCommerce installation running on Docker with MariaDB, installed via WP-CLI with sample product data. The task requires an agent to navigate the admin UI and modify these settings from their initial state.
